actions.value:
Hi,

thanks for reaching out.
We are sorry for the inconvenience.

Our servers have been restarted so you should see the balance in USD or your fiat currency again.

Please note: Devs are working to prevent such issue but if it happens in the future, your crypto are safe since you are the only one who holds the private keys. The problem affects the price in USD (and other fiat) only, NOT your assets.
